issues.detail: The skill does not explicitly address error scenarios or edge cases, focusing only on the happy path.

scenarios.name: Diagnose stalled SaaS growth
scenarios.rationale: Treatment maps the funnel, identifies activation as THE single constraint via Theory of Constraints, and runs a second-order check on support load — all required by the rubric; baseline lists generic tactics without isolating one constraint.

scenarios.name: Pre-decision second-order analysis on a price cut
scenarios.rationale: Treatment explicitly walks first/second/third-order effects and warns about LTV/segment drift per the skill's traps table; baseline lists pros/cons but does not chain order-effects or reference systems thinking patterns.
